parameters.content:
## Multi-Channel Order Aggregator

Combines orders from multiple sales channels into one unified daily log with totals.

1. Replace **Website Orders**, **Marketplace A Orders**, **Marketplace B Orders** with your own sources (Shopify/WooCommerce nodes, marketplace APIs, Google Sheets, etc.) - add or remove channel nodes as needed, just update the names referenced in **Merge All Channels**.
2. **Merge All Channels** combines everything into one list, tagged by channel.
3. **Daily Summary** gives total orders, revenue by channel, and top SKUs by units sold.

Note: all three channel nodes run in sequence (not parallel) so **Merge All Channels** can reliably reference all of them by name once they've all executed.
